Compliance.description: Takealot subsidiary; POPIA compliant; CPA compliant; FSCA not applicable; no major violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: App 4.5/5 strong; HelloPeter mixed; delivery complaints common but restaurant selection praised.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing; good restaurant range; Mr D+ subscription value; delivery fees moderate.

Innovation.description: Mr D+ subscription; real-time tracking; scheduled deliveries; Takealot integration; loyalty points.

Customer Support.description: In-app chat, call centre; mixed resolution; Takealot backing helps escalation.

Accessibility & Security.description: App-first national service; POPIA-compliant; secure payment integration; no major incidents.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Mr D+ R69/mo for free delivery; delivery R19-R39 otherwise; restaurant prices as listed

socialSentiment.summary: App highly rated; HelloPeter mixed; Takealot integration a positive; delivery complaints moderate.
